name: catpart-converter
description: Convert CATIA CATPart files into readable exchange formats such as STEP, OBJ, and STL.

interface.shortDescription: Turn CATPart files into STEP or mesh formats that Codex can inspect
interface.longDescription: A local workspace plugin that wraps an external CATIA-compatible converter and standardizes CATPart exports to STEP, OBJ, STL, IGES, BREP, and related formats for downstream inspection in Codex.
defaultPrompt: Convert this CATPart into STEP so you can inspect it
Probe the CATPart converter backend in this workspace
Export a CATPart to OBJ and save a conversion report
